name: raw-fpv-visual-labeler
summary: Perception-only clean-context labeling of visible cleanup-relevant movable objects from grouped RAW-FPV frames.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill consumes public RAW-FPV artifacts only. It must not receive private labels, hidden target ids, acceptable destination truth, executable observed-object handles, detector candidates, or camera-label producer candidates.

capability_requirements.notes: Offline perception probe only; output labels are not live cleanup handles and do not change camera-raw-fpv actionability.

refactor_signals: the labeler becomes useful across multiple perception corpora
all-visible movable truth generation becomes a reusable benchmark workflow
labels are proposed as live cleanup inputs
promote_to_mcp_when: only after a separate public contract decision defines an assisted camera evidence lane with stable provenance, privacy, and actionability rules
